options.name: Contact
options.action: Contact API — emails, socials and phones for a website
options.description: Crawls a public website URL (homepage plus contact/about/team/imprint pages) and returns its public business contact details: emails — each tagged with a verification `status` (`verified`, `risky`, `unverified`, `invalid`) and a `type` (`generic`, `role`, `personal`) — plus social-media profiles and phone numbers. Intended for authorized public-business data only.

options.name: Antibot Check
options.description: Probes a URL across escalating transports (direct HTTP → browser-impersonation → headless/stealth browsers) and returns an empirical scraping-difficulty assessment for that exact URL: a 0–10 `difficulty_score` and `difficulty_band` (`easy`, `medium`, `hard`, `very_hard`, `blocked`, `unknown`), whether it is `scrapeable`, the detected anti-bot `protections` (Cloudflare, DataDome, Akamai, PerimeterX, Kasada, Imperva, AWS WAF and more — each with a `kind` and `confidence`), the lightest transport that worked, and a `recommended_profile`. Difficulty is per-URL, not per-site — a homepage may be open while deep pages are bot-managed. Intended for authorized public-data scraping planning.

options.name: Web Scrape
options.action: Scrape a URL into markdown, HTML, links or metadata
options.description: Fetches a single public URL and returns clean content in the requested formats (markdown, html, raw_html, links, metadata). With render=auto the request starts as a fast HTTP fetch and escalates to a real browser when the page is blocked or rendered with JavaScript. only_main_content (default true) strips navigation, headers, footers and other boilerplate before conversion. Only public pages are supported; respect each site's terms of use and robots directives.

options.name: Kalshi Event

options.name: Kalshi Events

options.name: Kalshi Multivariate Events

options.name: Kalshi Exchange Schedule

options.name: Kalshi Exchange Status

options.name: Kalshi Historical Cutoff

options.name: Kalshi Historical Market

options.name: Kalshi Historical Market History
options.description: Returns normalized Kalshi candlesticks for one settled historical market from credential-free public market-data JSON.

options.name: Kalshi Historical Markets

options.name: Kalshi Historical Trades
options.description: Returns normalized older Kalshi trades from credential-free historical market-data JSON.

options.name: Kalshi Market
options.description: Returns one normalized Kalshi market row from credential-free public market-data JSON.

options.name: Kalshi Market History
options.description: Returns normalized Kalshi candlesticks for one market from credential-free public market-data JSON.

options.name: Kalshi Market Orderbook
options.description: Returns normalized yes/no bid levels for one Kalshi market ticker from public orderbook JSON.

options.name: Kalshi Markets
options.description: Returns normalized Kalshi market rows from credential-free public market-data JSON. The `status` enum accepts `unopened`, `open`, `closed`, and `settled`.

options.name: Kalshi Markets History
options.description: Returns normalized Kalshi candlesticks for up to 25 market tickers from credential-free public market-data JSON.

options.name: Kalshi Markets Orderbooks
options.description: Returns normalized yes/no bid levels for up to 25 Kalshi market tickers from public orderbook JSON.

options.name: Kalshi Series
options.description: Returns normalized Kalshi series rows from credential-free public market-data JSON.

options.name: Kalshi Series Detail
options.description: Returns one normalized Kalshi series row from credential-free public market-data JSON.

options.name: Kalshi Trades
options.description: Returns normalized recent Kalshi market trades from credential-free public market-data JSON.

options.name: Linkedin Company

options.name: Linkedin Product

options.name: Metaculus Category Questions
options.description: Returns normalized Metaculus question rows from a credential-free public category feed page. options.name: Metaculus Comments Feed
options.description: Returns normalized Metaculus question rows from the credential-free public comments feed page. Rows represent question cards with comment-related counts; upstream comment bodies are not exposed.

options.name: Metaculus Project Questions

options.name: Metaculus Questions

options.name: Metaculus Top Comments

options.name: Metaculus Tournament Questions
options.description: Returns normalized Metaculus question rows from a credential-free public tournament feed page.

options.name: Producthunt Category

options.name: Producthunt Category Products

options.name: Ready

options.name: Reddit Comments
options.description: Returns flat public comment entries from a Reddit post.

options.name: Reddit Domain Posts
options.description: Returns normalized public posts submitted from a linked domain.

options.name: Reddit Post
options.description: Returns a normalized public Reddit post entry.

options.name: Reddit Search
options.description: Searches public Reddit content and returns normalized public post entries.

options.name: Reddit Subreddit About
options.description: Returns RSS-derived public metadata and sample posts for a subreddit. Subscriber counts, icons, and banners are omitted because Reddit no-auth about JSON is not reliably reachable.

options.name: Reddit Subreddit Comments
options.description: Returns flat public comment entries from a subreddit latest-comments feed.

options.name: Reddit Subreddit Posts

options.name: Reddit Subreddits Posts
options.description: Returns normalized public posts from a combined multi-subreddit feed.

options.name: Reddit User Comments
options.description: Returns flat public comment entries from a public Reddit user's comments feed.

options.name: Reddit User Posts
options.description: Returns normalized public posts from a public Reddit user's submitted feed.

options.name: Redfin Estimate
options.description: Returns the Redfin Estimate for a property, including the current estimate, property facts, and the monthly estimate history with city/county/postal comparatives. Faithful pass-through of Redfin's public avm + avmHistoricalData resources.

options.name: Redfin Property
options.description: Returns normalized Redfin public property details. Provide a listing url, or a property_id (optionally with listing_id) to use Redfin's public stingray detail API.

options.name: Redfin Region Trends
options.description: Returns Redfin's aggregate market trends for a region (median list/sale price, sale-to-list, offers, days on market, inventory, year-over-year). Faithful pass-through of Redfin's public aggregate-trends resource.

options.name: Redfin Search
options.description: Returns normalized Redfin public listing search results from Redfin's credential-free region CSV endpoint. Pass region_id/region_type from autocomplete to skip location resolution.

options.name: Redfin Similar
options.description: Returns Redfin's comparable ("similar") listings for a property as normalized listing rows. Faithful pass-through of Redfin's public similars resource.

options.name: Rottentomatoes Browse Movies
options.description: Returns normalized movie rows from Rotten Tomatoes public browse pages using credential-free JSON-LD ItemList data. Supported `list` values are `movies_in_theaters`, `movies_at_home`, and `movies_coming_soon`. Supported `sort` values are `popular`, `newest`, and `top_box_office`; `top_box_office` is only valid with `movies_in_theaters`.

options.name: Rottentomatoes Browse Tv
options.description: Returns normalized TV series rows from Rotten Tomatoes public browse pages using credential-free JSON-LD ItemList data. Supported `list` value is `tv_series_browse`. Supported `sort` values are `popular` and `newest`.

options.name: Rottentomatoes Episode
options.description: Returns normalized Rotten Tomatoes TV episode metadata, scorecard data, parent series/season metadata, and public video metadata from a credential-free public episode page. Pass exactly one of `path` or `url`.

options.name: Rottentomatoes Movie
options.description: Returns normalized Rotten Tomatoes movie metadata, scorecard data, and representative embedded audience reviews. Pass exactly one of `path` or `url`.

options.name: Rottentomatoes Movie Reviews
options.description: Returns normalized critic or audience reviews from Rotten Tomatoes public review JSON hydrated by the movie review page, including pagination metadata. Pass exactly one of `path` or `url`. Supported `type` values are `critics`, `top-critics`, `audience`, and `verified-audience`.

options.name: Rottentomatoes Person
options.action: Rotten Tomatoes person detail and filmography
options.description: Returns normalized Rotten Tomatoes celebrity/person metadata and filmography rows from public Person JSON-LD and the credential-free filmography module. Pass exactly one of `path` or `url`.

options.name: Rottentomatoes Search
options.description: Returns normalized Rotten Tomatoes movie search rows from credential-free server-rendered search HTML.

options.name: Rottentomatoes Season
options.description: Returns normalized Rotten Tomatoes TV season metadata, scorecard data, parent series metadata, and episode rows from a credential-free public season page. Pass exactly one of `path` or `url`.

options.name: Rottentomatoes Series
options.description: Returns normalized Rotten Tomatoes TV series metadata and scorecard data from a credential-free public series page. Pass exactly one of `path` or `url`.

options.name: Shop App Analysis

options.name: Shop App Categories
options.description: Returns public Shop.app product categories.

options.name: Shop App Product
options.description: Returns normalized public product details from Shop.app.

options.name: Shop App Product Related
options.description: Returns related product cards from a public Shop.app product page.

options.name: Shop App Product Reviews
options.description: Returns public product reviews from a Shop.app product page.

options.description: Returns adjacent variants for a Shop.app product. selected_options must be a JSON object when provided. Repeated option filters may also be sent as option.Name=value or option[Name]=value.

options.name: Shop App Search

options.name: Shop App Shop

options.name: Shop App Collection Products
options.description: Returns public product cards from a Shop.app merchant collection. sort_by allowed values: MOST_SALES, PRICE_LOW_TO_HIGH, PRICE_HIGH_TO_LOW, RELEVANCE.

options.name: Shop App Shop Locations
options.description: Returns public retail locations for a Shop.app merchant profile.

options.name: Shop App Shop Products
options.description: Returns public product cards from a Shop.app merchant profile. sort_by allowed values: MOST_SALES, PRICE_LOW_TO_HIGH, PRICE_HIGH_TO_LOW, RELEVANCE.

options.name: Shop App Shop Reviews
options.description: Returns public reviews for a Shop.app merchant profile.

options.name: Shop App Shop Typeahead

options.name: Shop App Suggestions
options.description: Returns Shop.app autocomplete suggestions. Limit defaults to 10 and supports up to 20.

options.name: Shopify Collections

options.name: Shopify Collection Products
options.description: Returns normalized products from a public Shopify collection `/products.json` endpoint.

options.name: Shopify Products
options.description: Returns normalized products from a public Shopify `/products.json` endpoint. Valid empty result pages return `200` with an empty products array.

options.name: Shopify Product
options.description: Returns normalized product detail from Shopify's credential-free product handle `.js` endpoint.

options.name: Shopify Product Recommendations
options.description: Returns normalized recommended products from Shopify's credential-free recommendations Ajax endpoint. The route handle is resolved to a Shopify product id before fetching recommendations.

options.name: Shopify Search Suggest
options.description: Returns products, collections, and query suggestions from Shopify's credential-free predictive search Ajax endpoint.

options.name: Shopify Sitemap Urls

options.description: Returns child sitemap URLs from a public Shopify `/sitemap.xml` index with inferred sitemap types.

options.name: Shopify Store
options.description: Resolves a public Shopify storefront and returns normalized metadata from credential-free storefront JSON. If the vanity domain blocks `/products.json`, the service may fall back to a public `*.myshopify.com` domain discovered from the storefront page.

options.name: Similarweb Search

options.name: Similarweb Web

options.description: Returns normalized Spotify Web Player artist search results for a search term.

options.description: Returns normalized Spotify Web Player audiobook search results for a search term. The endpoint fetches anonymous Spotify credentials at request time; caller-supplied Spotify bearer or client tokens are not required.

options.description: Returns a Spotify chapter from the same private Pathfinder operation used for episodes and chapters.

options.description: Returns normalized Spotify Web Player episode search results for a search term.

options.name: Spotify Home
options.description: Returns normalized shelves and items from Spotify's Web Player home Pathfinder response. The endpoint fetches anonymous Spotify credentials at request time; caller-supplied Spotify bearer or client tokens are not required.

options.description: Returns normalized Spotify Web Player playlist metadata and items from Spotify's fetchPlaylist Pathfinder response. Provide either uri or id; defaults to a known public playlist when omitted.

options.name: Spotify Playlists Search
options.description: Returns normalized Spotify Web Player playlist search results for a search term. The endpoint fetches anonymous Spotify credentials at request time; caller-supplied Spotify bearer or client tokens are not required.

options.name: Spotify Popular By Country
options.description: Returns normalized Spotify country hub shelves from Spotify's countryHubsPage Pathfinder response. The country_code parameter accepts Spotify popular-in country codes from open.spotify.com/popular-in/us.

options.name: Spotify Profile Followers
options.description: Returns normalized public follower profiles from Spotify's Web Player user-profile service. Spotify exposes this as a public anonymous response for some profiles; private or restricted profiles may return an upstream error.

options.name: Spotify Profile Playlists
options.description: Returns normalized public playlists from Spotify's Web Player user-profile service. Provide username, uri, or url; defaults to Spotify's official profile.

options.name: Spotify Profiles Search
options.description: Returns normalized Spotify Web Player profile search results for a search term. The endpoint fetches anonymous Spotify credentials at request time; caller-supplied Spotify bearer or client tokens are not required.

options.name: Spotify Tracks Search
